_comment_instructions: === HOW TO ADD NEW ONBOARDING STEPS ===
_comment_1: 1. Copy an existing step object from the 'steps' array below
_comment_2: 2. Paste it at the end of the array (use the blank lines at the bottom)
_comment_3: 3. Update these properties: id, title, description, buttonText, buttonUrl, buttonIcon, notes
_comment_5: Option 1 - Heroicons: https://heroicons.com/ (free, MIT license, copy SVG code)
_comment_6: Option 2 - Bootstrap Icons: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/ (free, copy SVG)
_comment_7: Option 3 - Feather Icons: https://feathericons.com/ (free, simple icons)
_comment_8: Option 4 - Simple Icons: https://simpleicons.org/ (brand logos as SVG)
_comment_9: Option 5 - Use company/app favicons from their website and extract SVG
_comment_11: • Keep SVG width and height at 20x20 for consistency
_comment_12: • Use inline SVG code (wrap in single quotes to avoid JSON issues)
_comment_13: • If SVG has double quotes, escape them: \" or use single quotes inside
_comment_14: • Test colors: use fill='currentColor' to inherit button text color
_comment_15: • Keep SVG code compact (remove unnecessary attributes)
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Hope Ignites! Let's get you set up with everything you need to start your first day. The steps below will guide you through accessing your Microsoft 365 account, setting up Outlook, and accessing the Vatterott Training Institute. If at any point you need help, pleaase visit hopeignites.org/help.

steps.title: Install Microsoft Edge Browser
steps.description: Microsoft Edge is the officially supported browser for Hope Ignites. Install it before getting started.
notes: Microsoft Edge is required for the best experience with Hope Ignites applications
Once installed, set Edge as your default browser for seamless SSO (Single Sign-On)

pc.description: Good news — Microsoft Edge comes pre-installed on Windows. Check that it's up to date before getting started.
notes: Edge is already installed on Windows — open the Start menu and search for 'Microsoft Edge'
Go to Settings → Help & feedback → About Microsoft Edge to check for updates
Set Edge as your default browser: Settings → Default browser → Make default
Sign in to Edge with your @hopeignites.org account to sync bookmarks and settings

mac.description: Microsoft Edge is not pre-installed on Mac. Download and install it to get started with Hope Ignites.
notes: Download the .pkg installer from the Microsoft Edge download page
Open the downloaded file and follow the installation prompts
Once installed, open Edge and sign in with your @hopeignites.org account
Set Edge as your default browser: System Settings → Desktop & Dock → Default web browser → Microsoft Edge
Edge is also available on the Mac App Store if you prefer that route

linux.description: Microsoft Edge is available for Linux. Install it via the package manager or download the installer directly.
notes: Choose your package format: .deb (Ubuntu/Debian) or .rpm (Fedora/RHEL/openSUSE)
Debian/Ubuntu: Run 'sudo dpkg -i microsoft-edge-stable_*.deb' after downloading
Fedora/RHEL: Run 'sudo rpm -i microsoft-edge-stable-*.rpm' after downloading
Alternatively, add the Microsoft Edge repo to get automatic updates via your package manager
Once installed, sign in with your @hopeignites.org account to sync settings

steps._note: Each step needs a unique 'id' (used for tracking progress in localStorage)
steps.title: Login to Microsoft 365
steps.description: Access your Hope Ignites Microsoft 365 account to get started with email, OneDrive, and more.
steps.buttonIcon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 23 23' width='20' height='20'><path fill='#f25022' d='M1 1h10v10H1z'/><path fill='#00a4ef' d='M12 1h10v10H12z'/><path fill='#7fba00' d='M1 12h10v10H1z'/><path fill='#ffb900' d='M12 12h10v10H12z'/></svg>
notes: Use the credentials provided by your supervisor in the account creation email
You will need to set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) as part of your account setup process. For more infmation on MFA, please visit {LINK_TO_MFA_GUIDE}
Bookmark this page for quick access

steps.title: Setup Outlook Mobile and Desktop
steps.description: Install and configure Outlook on your devices to stay connected on the go.
notes: Download Outlook mobile app from the App Store or Google Play
For desktop, Outlook comes with Microsoft 365
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address

mac.description: Install and configure Outlook on your Mac and mobile devices to stay connected.
notes: Download Outlook for Mac from the Mac App Store or via the Microsoft 365 portal
Download the Outlook mobile app from the App Store on your iPhone
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address
On Mac, go to System Settings → Internet Accounts to also add your account to Apple Mail as a backup

pc.description: Install and configure Outlook on your Windows PC and mobile devices to stay connected.
notes: Outlook for Windows is included with your Microsoft 365 subscription — open the Start menu and search for Outlook
Download the Outlook mobile app from Google Play or the App Store
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address
Pin Outlook to your taskbar for quick access

linux.description: Access your email via Outlook on the web or configure a desktop mail client on your Linux machine.
notes: Outlook desktop is not available for Linux — use Outlook on the web at outlook.office.com
For a native experience, you can also configure Thunderbird with your @hopeignites.org account using IMAP/SMTP
Download the Outlook mobile app from Google Play or the App Store
Sign in with your @hopeignites.org email address

steps.title: Access Training Materials
steps.description: Complete your required onboarding training modules in the Learning Management System.
steps.buttonIcon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='20' height='20' fill='#4A90E2'><path d='M12 3L1 9l11 6 9-4.91V17h2V9L12 3z'/><path d='M5 13.18v4L12 21l7-3.82v-4L12 17l-7-3.82z'/></svg>
notes: Training modules must be completed within your first week
You'll receive a certificate upon completion
Contact HR if you have questions about required training
